detaileddescription.para: Reference to the main AccelByte subsystem
Cache chat room info. Populated after connect and updated on topic related events
Cache chat room member. Populated along with the topic events
Cache live chat messages
Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem passed in.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem instance that we wish to get this interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convenience method to get an instance of this interface from the subsystem associated with the world passed in.

parameterdescription.para: World instance that we wish to get the interface from
Instance of the interface that we got from the subsystem, or nullptr if not found

simplesect.para: boolean that is true if we could get an instance of the interface, false otherwise

detaileddescription.para: Convert Game Session Id to TopicId Note: Session chat only available when TextChat configuration is true
Convert Session Party Id to Topic Id Note: Party chat only available when TextChat configuration is true
Convert Lobby Party Id to Topic Id Note: Party chat only available when TextChat configuration is true
Convert User Id to personal Topic Id To be able to send personal chat, personal topic need to be created first
Determine chat room type based on topic Id

memberdef.argsstring: (MAX_LOCAL_PLAYERS, OnConnectChatComplete, bool, const FUniqueNetId &, const FString &)
memberdef.name: DEFINE_ONLINE_PLAYER_DELEGATE_THREE_PARAM

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, const FString &Nickname, const FChatRoomConfig &ChatRoomConfig) override
memberdef.name: CreateRoom

detaileddescription.para: Create a new chat room containing the given user. Deprecated.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user creating the chat room
#NOTE Unsupported field as the backend will generate an ID
The local nickname of the chat room
#NOTE Unsupported field as the backend does not support these configuration options

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

xrefdescription.para: Manual room creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat rooms!

detaileddescription.para: Create a new chat room containing the given user. Deprecated.

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user creating the chat room
The local nickname of the chat room
Configuration for the chat room

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

xrefdescription.para: Manual room creation is deprecated - please use V2 Sessions to auto-create chat rooms!

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, const FChatRoomConfig &ChatRoomConfig) override

detaileddescription.para: Update a room's configuration

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user updating the chat room
The ID of the chat room
#NOTE Unsupported

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

detaileddescription.para: Update a room's configuration

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user updating the chat room
The ID of the chat room

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user joining the chat room
The ID of the chat room
Local nickname for the chat room

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, const FString &Nickname, const FChatRoomConfig &ChatRoomConfig) override
memberdef.name: JoinPrivateRoom

detaileddescription.para: Join a private chat room - not supported!
Exit a chat room

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user exiting the chat room
The ID of the chat room

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, const FString &MsgBody) override
memberdef.name: SendRoomChat

detaileddescription.para: Send a chat message to a room

parameterdescription.para: ID of the user sending the message
The ID of the chat room
The message to send

simplesect.para: A boolean indicating whether the process was started successfully

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FUniqueNetId &RecipientId, const FString &MsgBody) override
memberdef.name: SendPrivateChat

detaileddescription.para: Kick off request for sending a chat message privately between users

parameterdescription.para: id of user that is sending the message
id of user to send the chat to
plain text of message body

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

detaileddescription.para: Delete system message(s) in user system inbox based on the message ids. Listen to OnDeleteSystemMessagesComplete delegate for the result after the action completed.

parameterdescription.para: id of user that perform this action
list of message ids to be deleted

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

detaileddescription.para: Update system message(s) in user system inbox. This can be used for marking message as keep or as read. Listen to OnUpdateSystemMessagesComplete delegate for the result after the action completed.

parameterdescription.para: id of user that perform this action
list of the action will be performed to the system message

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

detaileddescription.para: Query system message(s) in user system inbox. Listen to OnQuerySystemMessageComplete delegate for the result after the action completed.

parameterdescription.para: id of user that perform this action
optional query params, if left empty it will query all of the system messages

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

detaileddescription.para: Query transient system message(s) in user system inbox. Listen to OnQueryTransientSystemMessageComplete delegate for the result after the action completed.

parameterdescription.para: id of user that perform this action
optional query params, if left empty it will query all of the system messages

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

detaileddescription.para: Get system message(s) statistic in user system inbox. Currently the stats have oldest unread and unread count of system messages. Listen to OnGetSystemMessageStatsComplete delegate for the result after the action completed.

parameterdescription.para: id of user that perform this action
optional params for getting system message stats, currently it is still empty and can be ignored

simplesect.para: if successfully started the async operation

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatRoomId &RoomId, TArray< TSharedRef< FChatRoomMember > > &OutMembers) override
memberdef.name: GetMembers

detaileddescription.para: Return only live messages

memberdef.argsstring: (const FUniqueNetId &UserId, const FChatMessage &Message, const bool bIncludeExternalInstances) override
memberdef.name: IsMessageFromLocalUser

detaileddescription.para: Check if user has joined topic Can be use to check if user joined session chat or party chat
Check if user has personal chat topic to target user
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding disconnection from the chat service
Delegate fired when a sending a chat message is completed
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding a read chat
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding being added to a topic
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding being removed from a topic
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding a topic being updated
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding a topic being deleted
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding being banned from chat
Delegate fired when a notification is received regarding being un-banned from chat
Delegate fired when a system message received.
Delegate fired when a transient system message received.
Delegate fired when action to delete system messages completed.
Delegate fired when action to update system messages completed.

Remove member to topic cache. Called on EventRemovedFromTopic
Add topic to cache. Called on after connect success
Remove topicId from cache. Called on EventTopicDeleted
Get topic from cache
